13971.headline: Ordrim the Coin Witness was named among the gods.
13971.description: Ordrim the Coin Witness is a distant creator of trade and exchange for Counting Creed of Kelwatch. The god controls creation, prophecy, destiny, commandments, is marked by a market bell, and demands that followers punish false ledgers. Its creation claim says it seated the first market at Nordrim where bargains could be witnessed; its religious mandate says religion must witness fair exchange and punish false ledgers. Prophecies come through ledgers, road news, market bells, and a market bell appearing without hands, destiny works because destiny arrives through omens carried between places, miracles lean toward harvest, and commandments lean toward hospitality.

13972.headline: Lorara the Scale Mother was named among the gods.
13972.description: Lorara the Scale Mother is a stern judge of trade and exchange for Counting Creed of Kelwatch. The god controls commandments, destiny, miracles, is marked by a balanced scale, and demands that followers protect guest merchants. Its creation claim says it seated the first market at Nordrim where bargains could be witnessed; its religious mandate says religion must witness fair exchange and protect guest merchants. Prophecies come through ledgers, road news, market bells, and a balanced scale appearing without hands, destiny works because destiny is enforced through tests, public duties, and costly proof, miracles lean toward victory, and commandments lean toward law.

13973.headline: Rivport the Road Father was named among the gods.
13973.description: Rivport the Road Father is a stern judge of trade and exchange for Counting Creed of Kelwatch. The god controls prophecy, destiny, miracles, commandments, is marked by a sealed ledger, and demands that followers weigh bargains in public. Its creation claim says it seated the first market at Nordrim where bargains could be witnessed; its religious mandate says religion must witness fair exchange and weigh bargains in public. Prophecies come through ledgers, road news, market bells, and a sealed ledger appearing without hands, destiny works because destiny is enforced through tests, public duties, and costly proof, miracles lean toward harvest, and commandments lean toward law.

13974.headline: Quavale the Scale Mother was named among the gods.
13974.description: Quavale the Scale Mother is a vengeful messenger of trade and exchange for Counting Creed of Kelwatch. The god controls miracles, commandments, religion, is marked by a balanced scale, and demands that followers protect guest merchants. Its creation claim says it seated the first market at Nordrim where bargains could be witnessed; its religious mandate says religion must witness fair exchange and protect guest merchants. Prophecies come through ledgers, road news, market bells, and a balanced scale appearing without hands, destiny works because destiny presses through ruin, warning, and punishment, miracles lean toward protection, and commandments lean toward hospitality.

13975.headline: Hero's Crossing of Quadun, kept by Counting Creed of Kelwatch entered sacred memory.
13975.description: Hero's Crossing of Quadun, kept by Counting Creed of Kelwatch is a heroic myth of trade and exchange first told in Nordrim around Sorn Orhelm under Ordrim the Coin Witness. The creation claim says Ordrim the Coin Witness seated the first market at Nordrim where bargains could be witnessed. Its symbols are tied to Ilvale River.

13976.headline: Shield Tale of Ordun, kept by Counting Creed of Kelwatch entered sacred memory.
13976.description: Shield Tale of Ordun, kept by Counting Creed of Kelwatch is a heroic myth of trade and exchange first told in Nordrim around Gala Vorhill the 5th under Lorara the Scale Mother. Its symbols are tied to Ilvale River.

13977.headline: Sacred Compact of Juneria, kept by Counting Creed of Kelwatch entered sacred memory.
13977.description: Sacred Compact of Juneria, kept by Counting Creed of Kelwatch is a covenant myth of trade and exchange first told in Nordrim around Gideon Orhelm the 5th under Rivport the Road Father. Its symbols are tied to Ilvale River.

13978.headline: Mouth of Signs Sorn Orhelm was recognized.
13978.description: Sorn Orhelm became oracle for Counting Creed of Kelwatch in Nordrim, interpreting Hero's Crossing of Quadun, kept by Counting Creed of Kelwatch of Ordrim the Coin Witness with signs read from Ilvale River.

13979.headline: Crossing Keeper Quill Ingborn the 4th was recognized.
13979.description: Quill Ingborn the 4th became wayfinder for Counting Creed of Kelwatch in Nordrim, interpreting Shield Tale of Ordun, kept by Counting Creed of Kelwatch of Lorara the Scale Mother with signs read from Ilvale River.

13980.headline: Voice of the Veil Gala Vorhill the 5th was recognized.
13980.description: Gala Vorhill the 5th became oracle for Counting Creed of Kelwatch in Nordrim, interpreting Sacred Compact of Juneria, kept by Counting Creed of Kelwatch of Rivport the Road Father with signs read from Ilvale River.

13981.headline: Pelvale Perfect Work of Counting Creed of Kelwatch became doctrine.
13981.description: Pelvale Perfect Work of Counting Creed of Kelwatch is a doctrine of craft perfection under Ordrim the Coin Witness teaching that a realm is judged by the honesty of its craft. Its honored virtue is mastery, and its taboo is passing flawed work as finished. The religious mandate behind it says religion must witness fair exchange and punish false ledgers.

13982.headline: Belovar craft of Ordrim the Coin Witness was given.
13982.description: Belovar craft of Ordrim the Coin Witness is a craft commandment of Counting Creed of Kelwatch given under Ordrim the Coin Witness. It demands that followers punish false ledgers; its virtue is mastery, and its taboo is passing flawed work as finished. This follows Ordrim the Coin Witness's commandment style of hospitality.
